name: Chocolate Sour Cream Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
This rich cake is from Mendocino's CAFE BEAUJOLAIS. Chef Margaret Fox makes it for birthdays, and those adventurous couples who want a chocolate wedding cake. It is usually served with Creme Fraiche Chocolate Frosting (recipe on separate post).
1. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. Beat butter, sugar, and eggs in the bowl of an electric mixer until very light and fluffy, about 5 minutes.
3. Beat in melted chocolate and vanilla extract.
4. Stir in approximately one-third of the dry ingredients (flour mixture), half of the sour cream, another third of the flour mixture, the remaining sour cream, and finally the rest of the flour mixture.
5. Stir until just mixed.
6. Stir in hot coffee.
7. Pour batter into two 9-inch square pans that are greased and lined with waxed paper.
8. Tap or drop each pan several times onto the counter to release air bubbles.
9. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
10. Cool pans on a wire rack for 15 minutes.
11. Run a knife around the edge, turn out the cake, and cool completely.
